Host Saleor on AWS

Tags: Software Development e-Commerce Saleor GraphQL Next.js AWS

Continuing on with the first Saleor project I started last week, I’m now going to deploy this on AWS.

I’m starting off with this tutorial on Saleor x AWS elastic beanstalk.
